SELECT hash(SUBSTR(text_value, 1, 2)) FROM test_table WHERE text_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.text_value, hash(a.text_value) FROM test_table a JOIN test_table b ON hash(a.text_value) != hash(b.text_value);
WITH hashed_values AS (SELECT text_value, hash(text_value) AS hash_val FROM test_table) SELECT * FROM hashed_values WHERE hash_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CASE WHEN hash(text_value) IS NULL THEN 'NULL HASH' ELSE hash(text_value) END AS hash_result FROM test_table;
